scope.target: pre-implementation plan for pod-role-bootstrap/codex-preflight unknown fileArch handling

findings.summary: The plan should explicitly register the new Node-script/symlink fixture in runSelfTest()'s static fixtureNames list; otherwise adding only a fixture file will not make the preflight self-test fail first or prove the fix.
